recommendations.title: Bay of Angels
recommendations.overview: A bank clerk is drawn into the risky world of a gorgeous gambling addict.

recommendations.title: Donkey Skin
recommendations.overview: A fairy godmother helps a princess disguise herself so she won't have to marry her father.

recommendations.title: The Young Girls of Rochefort

recommendations.title: The Umbrellas of Cherbourg

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: The Christmas Secret
recommendations.overview: While her life is falling apart, single mother Christine finds a magical family heirloom that leads to love and good fortune during Christmas.

recommendations.title: A Little Bit of Heaven
recommendations.overview: A guarded woman finds out she's dying of cancer but, when she meets her match, the threat of falling in love is scarier than death.

recommendations.title: My Fault: London

recommendations.title: The Firefly
recommendations.overview: After her estranged brother's sudden death, young wife Lucia bonds with his fiancée through their shared grief and finds herself falling in love.
